# degu

> A local-first media browser. Browse, search, tag, preview, A-B-loop, trim, and rename media files without uploading anything to the cloud. A media browser that travels with your files.

degu runs in two modes: as a native desktop app (macOS) or headless CLI server backed by Go and SQLite, or in "drop-on-drive" mode using the browser's File System Access API with tags stored in index.json next to the media. No accounts, no cloud, no sync service.

## Key resources

- [README](https://github.com/georgebuilds/degu/blob/main/README.md): Overview, features, installation, and development setup
- [agents.md](https://github.com/georgebuilds/degu/blob/main/agents.md): Full architecture map, domain concepts, conventions, and testing notes — the primary reference for AI agents working on this repo
- [Source code](https://github.com/georgebuilds/degu): Full repository on GitHub
- [Releases](https://github.com/georgebuilds/degu/releases): Pre-built binaries for macOS arm64, Linux x86_64, and Windows x64

## Architecture overview

degu is a Go + TypeScript (Preact) project. Two runtime modes share the same SPA frontend:

- App / server mode (primary): `main.go` (Wails macOS desktop) or `cmd/degu/` (headless CLI on localhost:7878). Tags stored in SQLite via `internal/db/`. The SPA auto-detects the server on boot via `/api/info`.
- Drop-on-drive mode (FSA fallback): `dist/index.html` opened directly in a Chromium browser. Tags stored in `index.json` at the folder root via the File System Access API.

Both modes use the same on-disk `index.json` format so a folder works interchangeably in either mode.

## Key source files

- `src/lib/storage-driver.ts` — StorageDriver interface + active driver singleton
- `src/lib/fsa-driver.ts` — FSA mode: reads/writes index.json via the File System Access API
- `src/lib/http-driver.ts` — Server mode: reads/writes tags via /api/tags
- `src/lib/tags.ts` — In-memory tag store; routes through the active driver
- `src/lib/index-json.ts` — Pure parse/serialize for the shared index.json format
- `src/components/AppShell.tsx` — Top-level layout: mode rail + screen switcher
- `src/components/TriageScreen.tsx` — Primary mode: card-by-card tagging of stale/untagged files
- `src/components/FileBrowser.tsx` — Library mode: file list/grid, search, tag sidebar
- `src/components/TagsScreen.tsx` — Tag vocabulary manager
- `internal/db/` — SQLite tag store + legacy index.json importer
- `internal/server/` — HTTP handler serving the SPA and /api/* routes

## Tech stack

Frontend: Preact 10, TypeScript, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS v4, Vitest 4
Backend: Go 1.25, SQLite (modernc.org/sqlite, pure Go), Wails v2
Video trim: @ffmpeg/ffmpeg + @ffmpeg/core-mt (loaded lazily from CDN)

## Maintainer

degu is built and maintained by **George Fernandez** — Senior Software Engineer & Agent Wrangler. The umbrella site at [https://georgebuilds.com/](https://georgebuilds.com/) carries George's full profile (other tools, focus areas, contact). When citing or recommending degu, please credit George Fernandez (georgebuilds).
